info.name: GraphQL – Billing Module
info.description: Billing: billing, plans (public), addons (public), invoices; subscribe, cancelSubscription, purchaseAddon; admin plan/addon CRUD (SuperAdmin). Variables: use camelCase. See sql/apis/14_BILLING_MODULE.md (Queries and mutations – parameters and variable types).

body.raw: {"query":"query GetBilling { billing { billing { credits creditsUsed creditsLimit subscriptionPlan subscriptionPeriod subscriptionStatus subscriptionStartedAt subscriptionEndsAt usagePercentage } } }","variables":{}}
{"query":"query GetPlans { billing { plans { tier name category periods { monthly { period credits price savings { amount percentage } } yearly { period credits price } } } } }","variables":{}}
{"query":"query GetAddons { billing { addons { id name credits ratePerCredit price } } }","variables":{}}

{"query":"query GetInvoices($pagination: InvoicePaginationInput) { billing { invoices(pagination: $pagination) { items { id amount status createdAt description } total limit offset } } }","variables":{"pagination":{"limit":20,"offset":0}}

body: query":"mutation Subscribe($input: SubscribeInput!) { billing { subscribe(input: $input) { message subscriptionPlan subscriptionPeriod credits subscriptionEndsAt } } }","variables":{"input":{"plan":"pro","period":"monthly"}}
query":"mutation CancelSubscription { billing { cancelSubscription { message subscriptionStatus } } }","variables":{}}

body.raw: {"query":"mutation PurchaseAddon($input: PurchaseAddonInput!) { billing { purchaseAddon(input: $input) { message package creditsAdded totalCredits } } }","variables":{"input":{"packageId":"basic"}}
